companion_files.name: HANDOFF.md
companion_files.content:
# LLM_SESSION_HANDOFF.md

## Feature
- Artist/Album progressive loading pass (`ARTIST_ALBUM_PROGRESSIVE_LOADING_PLAN.md`)

## Current State
- Planning complete.
- Implementation complete for artist/album low-risk progressive pass across library + discovery paths.
- Follow-up Phase 12 complete for client-side artist-page fetch/render hotspots.

## Completed Work
1. Backend artist endpoint now supports additive include flags (all default true):
   - `includeDiscography`
   - `includeTopTracks`
   - `includeSimilarArtists`
2. Backend artist endpoint now gates expensive discography/top-tracks/similar work when flags are disabled.
3. Frontend API client `getArtist` now accepts optional include flags.
4. Frontend artist data hook now uses staged hydration:
   - fast core fetch first
   - full details fetch second for likely-library IDs
5. Frontend artist page now renders section-level progressive placeholders while details hydrate.
6. Changelog updated under `1.5.0` `Changed`.
7. Fork delta summary updated in `docs/FORK_DIFF.md` to include progressive artist hydration behavior.
8. Backend library album endpoint now supports additive include flag (default true):
   - `includeTracks`
9. Frontend API client `getAlbum` now accepts optional include flags.
10. Frontend album data hook now uses staged hydration for likely-library IDs:
   - fast core album fetch first (`includeTracks=false`)
   - full details fetch second (`includeTracks=true`)
11. Frontend album page now renders track-section placeholders during details hydration and guards play/shuffle/add-all actions until tracks are available.
12. Changelog and fork-delta summary updated to include album progressive hydration behavior.
13. Discovery album endpoint now also supports staged hydration:
   - `GET /artists/album/:mbid` accepts optional `includeTracks` (default `true`)
   - lightweight core + full details responses use separate cache keys
14. Album staged hydration hook now hydrates discovery album details in the background and keys details queries by source (`library` vs `discovery`) to avoid stale cross-source cache reuse.
15. Discovery artist endpoint now supports staged hydration:
   - `GET /artists/discover/:nameOrMbid` accepts optional section include flags (all default `true`):
     - `includeDiscography`
     - `includeTopTracks`
     - `includeSimilarArtists`
   - lightweight core + full details responses use include-aware cache keys.
16. Artist staged hydration hook now hydrates discovery artist details in the background and keys artist details queries by source to avoid stale cross-source cache reuse.
17. Artist staged hydration now avoids duplicate details fetches for MBID library artists when the initial payload was already full.
18. Artist available-album cover hydration now uses viewport-driven `IntersectionObserver` loading with near-viewport prefetch margin instead of per-card staggered timers.
19. `useImageColor` no longer performs render-phase URL transition state updates; sync cache/placeholder resolution is derived per URL and async extraction updates state only from async callbacks.
20. Changelog and fork-delta summary updated to include the Phase 12 artist-page responsiveness micro-optimizations.

## Verification
1. `cd backend && npm run build` passed.
2. `cd frontend && npm run lint` failed due pre-existing repo-wide lint/compiler issues unrelated to this feature.
3. Targeted lint passed for changed progressive-loading files:
   - `npx eslint app/artist/[id]/page.tsx features/artist/hooks/useArtistData.ts hooks/useQueries.ts`
   - `npx eslint app/album/[id]/page.tsx features/album/hooks/useAlbumData.ts hooks/useQueries.ts`
4. `cd frontend && npx eslint lib/api.ts` reports pre-existing `no-explicit-any` baseline errors in unrelated sections (not introduced by this pass).
5. `cd frontend && npx eslint features/artist/components/AvailableAlbums.tsx hooks/useImageColor.ts` passed.

## Key Files Touched
- `backend/src/routes/library.ts`
- `backend/src/routes/artists.ts`
- `frontend/lib/api.ts`
- `frontend/hooks/useQueries.ts`
- `frontend/features/artist/hooks/useArtistData.ts`
- `frontend/features/album/hooks/useAlbumData.ts`
- `frontend/app/artist/[id]/page.tsx`
- `frontend/app/album/[id]/page.tsx`
- `frontend/features/artist/components/AvailableAlbums.tsx`
- `frontend/hooks/useImageColor.ts`
- `CHANGELOG.md`
- `docs/FORK_DIFF.md`

## Next Actions
1. If desired, apply a further lightweight split for discovery artist "core" fields (for example deferring even top-level image/bio enrichment) in a separate risk-contained pass.
2. Continue Phase 11 backlog item `11.1` (`isCorePartial` metadata) to replace ID-shape heuristics in staged hydration hooks.
3. Address repo-wide frontend lint/react-compiler baseline issues independently (outside this feature scope).

## Nuance Audit
- Concern reviewed:
  - duplicate details fetches for MBID-based library artists when progressive discovery hydration is enabled.
- Assessment:
  - Phase 2 (library artist staged hydration): this was already safe.
    - Details hydration was gated by `shouldUseLightweightCore` (`!id.includes("-")`), so MBID/hyphen IDs did not trigger a second details fetch.
  - Phase 9 (discovery album staged hydration): not the same concern pattern.
    - Albums intentionally use lightweight core (`includeTracks=false`) then details hydrate, so two calls are expected by design.
  - Phase 10 (discovery artist staged hydration): concern was real and explicitly handled.
    - Added source-aware details keys and hydrate gating so library payloads that were already full do not refetch details.
- Current state:
  - Artist duplicate-fetch nuance is addressed in current code.
  - No known regressions tied to this nuance in prior completed phases.

## Follow-up Opportunities
1. Replace ID-shape heuristic with explicit `isCorePartial` metadata in artist/album API responses to remove ambiguity and simplify hydrate gating.
2. Add hook-level tests (mock API call counts) for `useArtistData`/`useAlbumData` to lock in no-duplicate-fetch behavior across:
   - library local ID
   - library MBID
   - discovery ID
3. Optionally add lightweight instrumentation counters in dev mode to spot unexpected details-query duplication during navigation.
4. Clean up repo-wide frontend lint baseline (`no-explicit-any`) so targeted lint can be expanded to full-file checks without known noise.

companion_files.name: PLAN.md
companion_files.content:
# ARTIST_ALBUM_PROGRESSIVE_LOADING_PLAN.md

## Document Status

- Last updated: 2026-02-13
- Feature: Low-risk progressive loading pass for artist/album page experience
- Scope: Backend artist/album payload slicing + frontend staged hydration + section-level progressive UI
- Scope: Backend artist/album payload slicing + frontend staged hydration + section-level progressive UI (library + discovery album path)
- Planning maturity: `Spec Outline` complete, `Refined Spec` complete, `Detailed Implementation Plan` complete
- Implementation approval: User approved implementation on 2026-02-13

## Planning Workflow Requirement

Before implementation begins, follow this sequence:

1. Build a spec outline.
2. Refine the spec outline.
3. Build a detailed implementation plan from the refined spec.
4. Expand each phase/task into small atomic tasks with concrete code references.
5. Obtain explicit user approval before writing implementation code.

Approval recorded:
- User request: implement a "low-risk progressive pass" and keep documentation current (plans, decisions, implemented/pending state).
- User request (album continuation): "Let's start on the albums page pass now" (2026-02-13).
- User request (next continuation): "Carry on with the next low-risk same staged approach" (2026-02-13).
- User request (latest continuation): "Carry on with the next low-risk staged target." (2026-02-13).
- User request (current continuation): "Let's pick back up." (2026-02-13).

## Inputs Used

1. `AGENTS.md`
2. `backend/src/routes/library.ts`
3. `frontend/app/artist/[id]/page.tsx`
4. `frontend/features/artist/hooks/useArtistData.ts`
5. `frontend/lib/api.ts`
6. `frontend/app/album/[id]/page.tsx`
7. `frontend/features/album/hooks/useAlbumData.ts`
8. `frontend/features/artist/hooks/useTidalTopTracks.ts`
9. `frontend/features/artist/hooks/useYtMusicTopTracks.ts`
10. `frontend/hooks/useQueries.ts`
11. `CHANGELOG.md`

## Goal

Improve perceived and real-time artist/album navigation responsiveness with low regression risk by:

1. Returning fast artist core data first.
2. Hydrating expensive artist sections progressively.
3. Preserving current non-group and group playback behaviors.
4. Keeping existing API defaults backward-compatible.

## Non-Goals

1. No schema migrations.
2. No large route refactors or service extraction.
3. No redesign of artist/album components.
4. No broad caching strategy rewrite.

---

## Spec Outline

### Capability Slices

1. Backend: optional skip flags for expensive artist endpoint work.
2. Frontend data layer: staged artist loading (core first, details second).
3. Frontend UI: avoid full-page block after core data; show section-level progressive placeholders.
4. Verification: lint and targeted runtime sanity checks.
5. Docs: changelog entry and ongoing session-context updates.

### Exit Criteria

1. Artist page renders hero/action quickly from lightweight payload.
2. Expensive sections (discography additions, top tracks, similar artists) hydrate after initial render.
3. Existing callers without query flags behave exactly as before.
4. `CHANGELOG.md` includes the behavioral change under `1.5.0`.

---

## Refined Spec

### Decision 1: Backend compatibility model

- Add three optional query params to `GET /library/artists/:id`:
  - `includeDiscography` (default `true`)
  - `includeTopTracks` (default `true`)
  - `includeSimilarArtists` (default `true`)
- Why: low-risk additive API change; preserves old behavior by default.
- Why not alternatives: creating new endpoints increases route surface and frontend branching.

### Decision 2: Staged client fetch for library artists only

- First query requests `include* = false` for fast core payload.
- Second query hydrates full data in background.
- Discovery fallback remains as-is.
- Why: avoids risky backend behavior changes for discovery routes.

### Decision 3: Progressive UI behavior

- Keep current full-screen loading only for the initial core fetch.
- After core data, keep page interactive and render placeholders for heavy sections while details load.
- Why: immediate user-visible improvement with minimal component churn.

### Decision 4: Album page risk posture

- Additive backend API shape change for library album route only:
  - `GET /library/albums/:id` accepts optional `includeTracks` (default `true`).
- Frontend album page uses staged hydration for likely-library IDs:
  - core album first (`includeTracks=false`)
  - full album details second (`includeTracks=true`)
- Discovery fallback remains as-is in this pass.
- Why: low-risk, backward-compatible, and focused on perceived load-time improvement for common library album navigation.

---

## Detailed Implementation Plan (Atomic Tasks)

### Status Legend

- `Pending`: Not started
- `In Progress`: Actively being worked
- `Complete`: Finished with summary

Completion summary template (required when task is `Complete`):

- Delivered:
- Files/functions/hooks touched:
- Verification/testing:

## Phase 1: Backend Progressive Artist Payload

### Task 1.1: Add optional include query parsing with default-true behavior
- Status: Complete
- References:
  - `backend/src/routes/library.ts` (`GET /library/artists/:id`)
- Completion Summary:
  - Delivered:
    - Added boolean query parsing helper and new optional flags on `GET /library/artists/:id`:
      - `includeDiscography`
      - `includeTopTracks`
      - `includeSimilarArtists`
    - All flags default to `true` for backward compatibility.
  - Files/functions/hooks touched:
    - `backend/src/routes/library.ts`
  - Verification/testing:
    - `cd backend && npm run build` (pass)

### Task 1.2: Gate expensive sections by include flags
- Status: Complete
- References:
  - `backend/src/routes/library.ts` (discography, Last.fm top tracks, similar artists)
- Completion Summary:
  - Delivered:
    - Added conditional execution for discography, Last.fm top tracks, and similar artist expansion.
    - Added lightweight cover-art fallback (`userHeroUrl ?? heroUrl`) when all include flags are `false`.
  - Files/functions/hooks touched:
    - `backend/src/routes/library.ts`
  - Verification/testing:
    - `cd backend && npm run build` (pass)

## Phase 2: Frontend Data Layer Staged Hydration

### Task 2.1: Extend API client `getArtist` to accept include options
- Status: Complete
- References:
  - `frontend/lib/api.ts`
- Completion Summary:
  - Delivered:
    - Extended `api.getArtist` to accept optional include flags and serialize them as query params.
  - Files/functions/hooks touched:
    - `frontend/lib/api.ts`
  - Verification/testing:
    - Targeted frontend lint on touched files passed for this path.

### Task 2.2: Add staged core/details artist queries and merge logic
- Status: Complete
- References:
  - `frontend/features/artist/hooks/useArtistData.ts`
  - `frontend/hooks/useQueries.ts` (if new query key is needed)
- Completion Summary:
  - Delivered:
    - Implemented staged artist data loading:
      - core query (lightweight for likely library IDs)
      - details query (full hydration in background)
    - Added merged artist result and `detailsLoading` state.
    - Added `queryKeys.artistDetails`.
  - Files/functions/hooks touched:
    - `frontend/features/artist/hooks/useArtistData.ts`
    - `frontend/hooks/useQueries.ts`
  - Verification/testing:
    - `npx eslint app/artist/[id]/page.tsx features/artist/hooks/useArtistData.ts hooks/useQueries.ts` (pass)

### Task 2.3: Keep refetch/retry/download-completion semantics aligned
- Status: Complete
- References:
  - `frontend/features/artist/hooks/useArtistData.ts`
- Completion Summary:
  - Delivered:
    - Preserved retry behavior for incomplete discography using details query.
    - Preserved refresh behavior after download completion via unified `reloadArtist`.
  - Files/functions/hooks touched:
    - `frontend/features/artist/hooks/useArtistData.ts`
  - Verification/testing:
    - Manual review of hook effects and dependencies; targeted lint pass.

## Phase 3: Frontend Progressive Artist UI

### Task 3.1: Replace full-page block after core load with section-level progressive placeholders
- Status: Complete
- References:
  - `frontend/app/artist/[id]/page.tsx`
- Completion Summary:
  - Delivered:
    - Artist page now keeps full-page loading only for initial core fetch.
    - Added section-level placeholder skeletons for Popular, Available Albums, and Similar Artists during detail hydration.
    - Preserved Listen Together and playback action behavior.
  - Files/functions/hooks touched:
    - `frontend/app/artist/[id]/page.tsx`
  - Verification/testing:
    - `npx eslint app/artist/[id]/page.tsx features/artist/hooks/useArtistData.ts hooks/useQueries.ts` (pass)

### Task 3.2: Avoid unnecessary top-track gap-fill status checks before top tracks exist
- Status: Complete
- References:
  - `frontend/features/artist/hooks/useTidalTopTracks.ts`
  - `frontend/features/artist/hooks/useYtMusicTopTracks.ts`
- Completion Summary:
  - Delivered:
    - Avoided additional hook-level changes in this pass to keep risk low and preserve existing stream matching behavior.
    - Functional equivalent achieved by gating hook input to `null` until top tracks exist in the page layer.
  - Files/functions/hooks touched:
    - `frontend/app/artist/[id]/page.tsx`
  - Verification/testing:
    - Targeted lint pass on touched files.

## Phase 4: Verification and Documentation

### Task 4.1: Run frontend lint for touched code
- Status: Complete
- References:
  - `frontend/` (`npm run lint`)
- Completion Summary:
  - Delivered:
    - Ran backend compile and frontend lint checks.
  - Files/functions/hooks touched:
    - N/A (verification task)
  - Verification/testing:
    - `cd backend && npm run build` (pass)
    - `cd frontend && npm run lint` (fails due pre-existing repo-wide lint/compiler issues unrelated to this change)
    - `cd frontend && npx eslint app/artist/[id]/page.tsx features/artist/hooks/useArtistData.ts hooks/useQueries.ts` (pass)

### Task 4.2: Update changelog entry under `1.5.0`
- Status: Complete
- References:
  - `CHANGELOG.md`
- Completion Summary:
  - Delivered:
    - Added `1.5.0` `Changed` entry describing progressive artist hydration and new optional artist endpoint include flags.
  - Files/functions/hooks touched:
    - `CHANGELOG.md`
  - Verification/testing:
    - Manual changelog review.

### Task 4.3: Update session handoff and prompt history for this feature
- Status: Complete
- References:
  - `.agents/plans/archived/artist-album-progressive-loading/HANDOFF.md`
  - `plans/archived/artist-album-progressive-loading/PROMPT_HISTORY.md`
- Completion Summary:

  - Files/functions/hooks touched:

  - Files/functions/hooks touched:

  - Verification/testing:
    - Manual doc consistency review against `CHANGELOG.md` and implemented code.

## Phase 5: Backend Progressive Album Payload

### Task 5.1: Add optional `includeTracks` query parsing with default-true behavior
- Status: Complete
- References:

- Completion Summary:

## Phase 6: Frontend Album Staged Hydration

## Phase 7: Frontend Album Progressive UI

## Phase 9: Discovery Album Staged Hydration (Follow-up)

- Status: Complete

  - Files/functions/hooks touched:

### Task 9.5: Validate progressive UI behavior remains correct on discovery albums
- Status: Complete
- References:
  - `frontend/app/album/[id]/page.tsx`
- Completion Summary:
  - Delivered:
    - Verified existing album progressive UI behavior remains valid for discovery albums with staged details hydration (hero renders from core payload, tracks section hydrates with placeholder).
  - Files/functions/hooks touched:
    - No additional code changes required.
  - Verification/testing:
    - Included in targeted frontend lint/build checks in task 9.6.

### Task 9.6: Verification and docs sync for discovery staged hydration
- Status: Complete

### Task 11.4: Reduce lint-baseline noise blocking full-file targeted validation
- Status: Pending
- References:
  - `frontend/lib/api.ts`
  - frontend lint config and related type cleanup touchpoints

## Phase 12: Client-Side Render/Fetch Hotspot Cleanup (Follow-up)

### Follow-up Spec Outline

1. Replace render-time state transition in `useImageColor` with non-render-phase synchronization.
2. Replace per-card delayed cover fetch in artist `AvailableAlbums` with viewport-driven loading and near-viewport prefetch.
3. Keep API contracts and card rendering behavior unchanged.

### Follow-up Refined Spec

#### Decision 12.A: `useImageColor` state transitions must happen outside render

- Remove URL-change `setState` calls from render.
- Keep synchronous placeholder/cache bootstrap behavior via `resolveSync` and drive extraction-state updates from async callbacks.
- Why: removes render-phase `setState` churn during artist/album navigation while preserving current palette behavior.

#### Decision 12.B: Album cover hydration should be viewport-aware

- Use `IntersectionObserver` per card to trigger fetch only when a card is near/inside viewport.
- Use positive `rootMargin` to prefetch one-ish upcoming viewport row.
- Why: reduces burst requests and improves first-render responsiveness on large available-album grids.

### Task 12.1: Implement viewport-driven cover hydration in `AvailableAlbums`
- Status: Complete
- References:
  - `frontend/features/artist/components/AvailableAlbums.tsx`
- Completion Summary:
  - Delivered:
    - Replaced staggered timer-based per-card cover fetches with `IntersectionObserver`-gated fetches.
    - Added near-viewport prefetch margin (`rootMargin`) so covers for the next scroll row are requested slightly ahead of view.
    - Preserved existing card rendering and download interactions.
  - Files/functions/hooks touched:
    - `frontend/features/artist/components/AvailableAlbums.tsx`
  - Verification/testing:
    - `cd frontend && npx eslint features/artist/components/AvailableAlbums.tsx hooks/useImageColor.ts` (pass)

### Task 12.2: Move `useImageColor` URL transition logic to `useEffect`
- Status: Complete
- References:
  - `frontend/hooks/useImageColor.ts`
- Completion Summary:
  - Delivered:
    - Removed render-phase URL-change state updates from `useImageColor`.
    - Reworked hook state model to derive sync palette/loading from `resolveSync(imageUrl)` and update async extraction state only from async callbacks.
  - Files/functions/hooks touched:
    - `frontend/hooks/useImageColor.ts`
  - Verification/testing:
    - `cd frontend && npx eslint features/artist/components/AvailableAlbums.tsx hooks/useImageColor.ts` (pass)

### Task 12.3: Verification and docs sync for hotspot cleanup
- Status: Complete
- References:
  - `frontend/features/artist/components/AvailableAlbums.tsx`
  - `frontend/hooks/useImageColor.ts`
  - `CHANGELOG.md`
  - `docs/FORK_DIFF.md`
  - `.agents/plans/archived/artist-album-progressive-loading/HANDOFF.md`
  - `plans/archived/artist-album-progressive-loading/PROMPT_HISTORY.md`
- Completion Summary:
  - Delivered:
    - Ran targeted lint for touched frontend files.
    - Updated changelog and fork-delta summary for the user-visible artist-page responsiveness adjustments.
    - Updated feature-scoped handoff/prompt history for session continuity.
  - Files/functions/hooks touched:
    - `CHANGELOG.md`
    - `docs/FORK_DIFF.md`
    - `.agents/plans/archived/artist-album-progressive-loading/HANDOFF.md`
    - `plans/archived/artist-album-progressive-loading/PROMPT_HISTORY.md`
  - Verification/testing:
    - `cd frontend && npx eslint features/artist/components/AvailableAlbums.tsx hooks/useImageColor.ts` (pass)

companion_files.name: PROMPT_HISTORY.md
companion_files.content:
# PROMPT_HISTORY.md

## 2026-02-13
1. User asked where artist/album pages could be sped up and whether progressive loading was possible.
2. User approved implementation of a low-risk progressive pass.
3. User required persistent documentation of plan, decisions, implemented items, and pending work.
4. Implementation direction chosen:
   - backend additive include flags for artist endpoint
   - frontend staged artist hydration
   - section-level progressive placeholders on artist page
5. Validation requirement accepted:
   - run backend/frontend checks and report pre-existing lint baseline issues separately from feature changes.
6. Documentation alignment requirement applied:
   - update fork-delta summary docs for user-visible behavior changes while keeping commit appendix committed-history only.
7. User requested immediate continuation into album page progressive-loading work.
8. Album pass implementation direction chosen:
   - backend additive `includeTracks` on `/library/albums/:id` (default `true`)
   - frontend staged album hydration (`core` then `details`)
   - album track-section placeholder while details load
   - guard album play/shuffle/add-all controls until tracks are present
9. Album pass documentation alignment requirement applied:
   - update `CHANGELOG.md` and `docs/FORK_DIFF.md` for user-visible behavior changes.
10. User requested continuation with the next low-risk staged approach.
11. Discovery album follow-up direction chosen:
    - add additive `includeTracks` on `/artists/album/:mbid` (default `true`)
    - keep response shape stable with `tracks: []` for core payload
    - stage discovery details hydration in `useAlbumData` using source-aware details query keys
12. Verification + docs requirement repeated:
    - rerun backend build and targeted frontend lint
    - keep changelog/fork-diff and feature handoff/history in sync.
13. User requested continuation to the next low-risk staged target, with explicit instruction to re-anchor on project docs if context compaction occurs.
14. Discovery artist follow-up direction chosen:
    - add additive include flags on `/artists/discover/:nameOrMbid` (all default `true`)
    - preserve stable response arrays for excluded sections
    - stage discovery details hydration in `useArtistData` with source-aware artist-details query keys
    - avoid duplicate details fetches when MBID resolves to full library payload
15. Discovery artist follow-up documentation requirement applied:
    - update changelog/fork-diff wording to include discovery artist staged hydration
    - update feature handoff/history after verification.
16. User requested pausing further low-risk implementation and prioritizing complete handoff context for the next session.
17. Opportunity backlog explicitly captured for next session:
    - replace ID-shape heuristic with explicit API metadata (`isCorePartial`) for artist/album payloads
    - add hook-level call-count tests for `useArtistData`/`useAlbumData` across library local ID, library MBID, and discovery ID
    - optionally add lightweight dev instrumentation counters for unexpected details-query duplication during navigation
    - clean up repo-wide frontend lint baseline (`no-explicit-any`) to reduce validation noise.
18. User asked to resume this feature thread ("Let's pick back up.") from prior artist/album performance opportunities.
19. Follow-up direction chosen for this continuation:
    - optimize artist available-album missing-cover fetch strategy from per-card staggered timers to viewport-driven IntersectionObserver loading with near-viewport prefetch
    - remove render-phase state transition updates in `useImageColor` to reduce navigation re-render churn
20. Validation + docs requirement applied again:
    - run targeted frontend lint for touched files
    - update `CHANGELOG.md`, `docs/FORK_DIFF.md`, and feature-scoped plan/handoff/history.
